name: file_patch
description: Modify files with structured actions: replace (with --stdin for multi-line heredoc), batch-replace --stdin (multiple old/new pairs in one read-write), multi-replace, insert-before/after, delete-matching, append, prepend, and replace-block, delete-lines START END for line-number deletions.

parameters.name: --dir=DIR
parameters.description: Working directory to cd into before patching

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: Path to the file to modify

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: replace, batch-replace --stdin, multi-replace, insert-before, insert-after, delete-matching, append, prepend, or replace-block

parameters.name: args
parameters.description: Action-specific arguments; batch-replace --stdin reads multiple old/new pairs from stdin with --- and === delimiters

parameters.name: delete-lines <start> <end>
parameters.description: Delete lines from start to end by line number (1-indexed, inclusive)

examples.expected: Applies multiple replacements in one read-write cycle, saving N-1 steps vs sequential replace calls

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses N sequential read-edit-write cycles on the same file into 1 step; --dir eliminates separate cd step.
